song.title: Marvelous Light
song.presentation: C V1 P C V2 P C B P C
song.lyrics: [v1] I once was fatherless, a stranger with no hope Your kindness wakened me, wakened me from my sleep Your love it beckons deeply, a call to come and die By grace now I will come and take this life take Your life [p] Sin has lost its power, death has lost its sting From the grave You've risen, victoriously [c] Into marvelous light I'm running Out of darkness out of shame By the cross You are the Truth You are the Life You are the Way [v2] My dead heart now is beating, my deepest stains now clean Your breath fills up my lungs, now I'm free now I'm free [b] Lift my hands and spin around See the light that I have found Oh the marvelous light marvelous light
